reviews.comment:
Clásica parada en la ruta 2. Siempre limpio, siempre atentos los mozos y la comida excelente.
Vale hacer la parada aquí!

(Translated by Google)
A classic stop on Route 2. Always clean, the waiters are always attentive, and the food is excellent. It's worth stopping here!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWNVUxcHVPVkp2Vm1vNWMwMURNVmx0ZGpaTGRVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo ambas estaciones de servicio. En la del ACA me gustó más la limpiéza, el comedor y el puesto donde venden alimentos artesanales
Los baños impecables.
Habitualmente paran micros de larga distancia y otros de turismo como fue mí caso

(Translated by Google)
Both service stations are very nice. I preferred the cleanliness of the ACA station, the dining area, and the stand selling artisanal foods. The restrooms were spotless. Long-distance buses and tourist buses, like mine, frequently stop there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taTGVDMDNOMHB5VTFGSWRGZEVUamhNYldsa1ZFRRAB

reviews.comment:
Dormimos con motorhome en el predio que tienen, muy cómodo y limpio

(Translated by Google)
We slept in a motorhome on their property, which was very comfortable and clean.

reviews.comment:
Realmente lindo para tomar o comer  algo todo impecable son muy atentos todos
Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A really lovely place to grab a bite or a drink; everything is spotless and everyone is very attentive. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Las verdaderas "medialunas" del viejo Atala#a y también no dejen de probar las palmeritas tamaño plato y los "Cañones rellenos de dulce de leche..!! ;)

(Translated by Google)
The real "medialunas" from old Atala#a and don't forget to try the plate-sized palmeritas and the "Cañones" filled with dulce de leche..!! ;)

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada cuando volves de la costa! Medialunas riquísimas, también se puede almorzar y la limpieza del lugar es para destacar.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop when you're coming back from the coast! Delicious croissants, you can also have lunch, and the cleanliness of the place is outstanding.
